raw_title: Dancing with AI: The Impact of AI-Generated Images and Videos on Chinese Visual Journalism
title_en: Dancing with AI: The Impact of AI-Generated Images and Videos on Chinese Visual Journalism
title_zh: 与AI共舞：AI生成图像和视频对中国视觉新闻的影响
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了人工智能生成的图像和视频如何影响中国的视觉新闻报道。它关注AI技术如何改变新闻制作方式，以及这对新闻行业和观众意味着什么。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how AI-generated images and videos are affecting visual journalism in China. It focuses on how AI technology is changing news production and what this means for the industry and audiences.
research_direction_zh: 探索人工智能技术在新闻媒体领域的应用及其对新闻生产、伦理和行业发展的影响。
research_direction_en: Exploring the application of artificial intelligence technology in news media and its impact on news production, ethics, and industry development.
